task-1-1-a1b2c.title: Define data model
task-1-1-a1b2c.context:
## Context
Define the core data model and types for the feature, including the main entity and its relationships as described in the PRD.

task-1-2-d3e4f.title: Implement service layer
task-1-2-d3e4f.context:
## Context
Implement the service that exposes CRUD operations over the data model defined in task 1.1, following the project's conventions for validation and error handling.

task-2-1-g5h6i.title: Add UI
task-2-1-g5h6i.context:
## Context
Build the user-facing UI that consumes the service layer, including list and form views, loading states, and error handling.

task-2-2-j7k8l.title: Add tests
task-2-2-j7k8l.context:
## Context
Add unit and integration tests covering the data model, service layer, and UI for the feature.
